[[File:Knock.svg|thumb]]
Antibodies is the proposed [[booster shot]] against [[foreign enstuckment]]. 

It means being able to recognize a foreign idea within you that is impairing you so you can remove it and see clearly.

It is the only [[booster shot]] which is completely absent from the philosophy of [[John Vervaeke]]. [[larping]] and [[ego death]]/[[gnosis]] are both considered elements of the same response to a perrenial problem in his philosophy, by contrast antibodies are unique to [[evolutionism]] being influence derived from [[attachment theory]] and [[Alok Kanojia]] rather than from Vervaeke
[[Category:Ninefold vaccine]]
[[sn:Antibodies]][[Category:Antibodies]]
[[sn:Antibodies]][[sn:Antibodies]][[Category:Entrapment]]
[[sn:Antibodies]][[Category:Foreign entrapment]]
[[sn:Antibodies]][[Category:Booster shots]]
[[Category:Gnosis]]
[[sn:Antibodies]]==In Catgirl Simulator==
In [[Catgirl Simulator]], the Antibodies aspect, being one part of the Ninefold Vaccine, symbolizes a significant retrofitting of the aspect system as found in its predecessor, Cultist Simulator. Even though certain elements such as tools are not present in the latter, the Antibodies aspect provides a novel dimension to the game's internal mechanics.

This aspect represents the player's defence against the Foreign Entrapment, mirroring the Knock aspect from Cultist Simulator which symbolizes transitions and overcoming barriers. As Knock opens new doors and creates new paths, Antibodies neutralize harmful foreign influences, liberating individuals from the chains of external entrapment.

The Antibodies aspect includes a collection of 12 lore elements, 4 influence levels, and at least 12 books (at least one for each lore level), offering a rich array of information and narratives to the players.
====Lore Elements====
A Locksmith's Secret (fragmentknock): Sooner or later, every locksmith has the Dream. Now we recite its seven phases. This lore provides Knock influence necessary for nearly every summoning Rite.

Rites of the Unbound (fragmentknockb): When entrapped by foreign ideas, it is a daunting task to free oneself. Rites of the Unbound aids in navigating this labyrinth, providing the necessary guidance and strength to break free.

The Serpent's Shed (fragmentknockc): Just as a serpent sheds its skin, one must discard outdated ideas and perspectives that no longer serve. The Serpent's Shed signifies this necessary transformation, resonating with the theme of renewal and rebirth.

Incantation of Release (fragmentknockd): Harnessing the transformative power of cosmic transitions, this incantation aids in the release of internalized prejudices and fears, empowering the individual to break free from the foreign entrapment.

Pathway of the Released (fragmentknocke): This wisdom helps unravel the chains of outdated ideas and beliefs, guiding the individual along the pathway of the Released, where one's identity is no longer dictated by foreign entrapment.

Threshold Invocation (fragmentknockf): The Threshold Invocation seeks guidance from the Earth-Bound Deity, a symbol of transitions, to understand and navigate the intricacies of foreign entrapment, fostering resilience and adaptability.

Secrets of the Liberated (fragmentknockg): These teachings offer insight into the mysteries of the Gate - the transition from a life ruled by foreign entrapment to a life of self-guided liberation and individual truth.
====Influences====
Soft Echo (influenceknock): A quiet vibration heralds the creation of Antibodies, a shield against Foreign Entrapment. This influence signifies the first signs of liberation, breaking free from external chains.

Resonant Frequency (influenceknockc): The vibrational harmony of Antibodies resonates, shattering the bonds of Foreign Entrapment. This influence represents the liberation gaining momentum, creating paths to freedom.

Freedom's Symphony (influenceknocke): The music of Antibodies fills existence, Foreign Entrapment retreats. This influence is a chorus of liberation, chains of entrapment fall away.

Harmony Unchained (influenceknockg): The song of Antibodies reaches its crescendo, Foreign Entrapment is no more. This might be the pure vibration of Antibodies, strong enough to summon the most potent entities.
====Books ====
Things Fall Apart (bookknocka.1): A seminal piece of literature by Chinua Achebe, it explores the clash between tradition and change, offering a profound portrayal of the human response to societal transformation.

The Body Keeps the Score (bookknocka.2): This book by Dr. Bessel van der Kolk uses recent scientific advances to show how trauma literally reshapes both body and brain.

Braiding Sweetgrass (bookknockb): Robin Wall Kimmerer intertwines indigenous wisdom, scientific knowledge, and plant teachings, illuminating a path toward healing the ecological devastation of our lands.

Undoing Gender (bookknockc): Judith Butler addresses the regulation of sexuality and gender taking place in psychology, aesthetics, and social policy, investigating the ways in which the gendered subject is formed.

Stone Butch Blues (bookknockd): Leslie Feinberg’s first novel is widely considered a groundbreaking work about the complexities of gender, featuring a profound exploration of identity and the quest for social justice.

African Ethics (bookknocke): Thaddeus Metz presents a comprehensive ethical theory grounded on the principles of African philosophy, providing a philosophical justification for moral ideals originating in African cultures.

Post Transsexual Manifesto (bookknockf): Sandy Stone breaks new ground in gender studies, challenging the medicalization and pathologization of transgender people while arguing for an acceptance of multiple identities.

The Tibetan Book of the Dead (bookknockg): A Buddhist scripture that guides the departed through experiences in the afterlife, offering profound insights that can also serve as a guide for living, dying, and transcending the confines of ordinary reality.[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
